title: Automation Emails for Subitems
excerpt:

posts.author: acaffery (Alex Caffery)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking at setting up automation emails for when a status changes people in the People column receive an email letting them know the status has changed.

Some of my clients do not have Slack so they don’t receive notifications.
